title: Neighbourhood policing grant allocations and projections: 2025 to 2026
body: "As set out at the 2025 to 2026 police funding settlement, £200 million of funding has been allocated to forces in England and Wales in 2025 to 2026 to deliver the first steps towards placing 13,000 additional police officers, Police Community Support Officers (PCSOs) and special constables into neighbourhood policing roles by the end of this Parliament. "
